name: HVM Wireless Miniature Ball Valve
desc: Compact wireless remote-control miniature ball valve with IoT-enabled remote operation.
overview: The HVM Wireless miniature ball valve requires no wiring — powered by a rechargeable Li-ion 3.6V battery with LoRaWAN / 4G wireless communication. OTA firmware updates. 100,000-cycle service life. Ideal for retrofit installations where cabling is impractical.

specs.label: Nominal diameter
specs.value: DN8 / DN15 / DN20 / DN25 / DN32 / DN40

features: Wireless installation: no wiring required, reducing construction costs
Multi-protocol compatibility: LoRaWAN / 4G wireless for easy integration and expansion
Low power consumption with long operating life; suitable for applications without continuous power supply
OTA firmware upgrades over the air — no field service required
Bluetooth commissioning app for on-site setup and diagnostics
100,000-cycle rated — same durability as wired version
